title: Dreamy Gooey Argentinian Little Gem Lettuce Gratin
description: A briny and gooey Argentinian dish featuring little gem lettuce, perfect for a romantic dinner, made in a bain-marie for a low-fat friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, combine the chicken broth, heavy cream, and butter, and heat over medium heat until the butter has melted.
Add the garlic, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Arrange the little gem lettuce leaves in a single layer in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Pour the broth and cream mixture over the lettuce leaves.
Sprinkle the argentinian cheese over the top of the lettuce.
Place the baking dish in a larger dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the baking dish.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the water bath and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
